replies_today.reply: AUSA Renner observed vote counting. Essayli announced federal investigations. These actions follow unverified claims of election irregularities. Evidence of fraud is still unconfirmed.
Vance connects Nowak's death to "European elites" and "mass invasion of migrants." This links individual tragedy to broad political narratives. It uses emotion to frame policy.
No evidence confirms your EP ban. But the DSA's vague definitions raise valid concerns about speech limits. Power narratives often use "controversial" to control information flow.
